examples.title: Quick Sort Partition
examples.code:
FUNCTION partition(arr, low, high):
    pivot = arr[high]
    i = low - 1
    FOR j FROM low TO high-1:
        IF arr[j] <= pivot:
            i += 1
            SWAP arr[i] and arr[j]
    SWAP arr[i+1] and arr[high]
    RETURN i+1
examples.explanation: Selects last element as pivot and partitions array

examples.title: Merge Sort Implementation
examples.code:
def merge_sort(arr):
    if len(arr) > 1:
        mid = len(arr)//2
        L = arr[:mid]
        R = arr[mid:]
        merge_sort(L)
        merge_sort(R)
        i = j = k = 0
        while i < len(L) and j < len(R):
            if L[i] <= R[j]:
                arr[k] = L[i]
                i += 1
            else:
                arr[k] = R[j]
                j += 1
            k += 1
        while i < len(L):
            arr[k] = L[i]
            i += 1
            k += 1
        while j < len(R):
            arr[k] = R[j]
            j += 1
            k += 1
examples.explanation: Divides array into halves and merges sorted subarrays
